title: PruneNerResponse
description: Response emitted by `sqlite-graphrag prune-ner --json` on stdout as a single JSON line.

action.description: 'pruned' when bindings were physically removed; 'dry_run' when --dry-run was passed; 'aborted' when --yes was not passed.

bindings_removed.description: Number of memory-entity NER binding rows removed (or that would be removed in dry_run/aborted mode).

namespace.description: Namespace in which the prune was performed.

entity.description: Entity name targeted when --entity was used.
